input_text: Nak ambil SPM result pun kena beratur panjang. Kenapa tak boleh check online? Dah tahun 2026 masih macam ni.
reason: Long queues for SPM results collection despite digital era.
suggested_rewrite: Keputusan SPM boleh disemak secara dalam talian untuk mengelakkan kesesakan di sekolah. Sekolah perlu menyediakan pilihan digital.

input_text: I need to go to three different counters to settle one bill. Government efficiency at its finest.
reason: Sarcastic criticism of government requiring multiple counters for one transaction.
suggested_rewrite: Multi-counter processes could be streamlined through integrated systems. Many government payments can now be made online through MyGovernment portal.

input_text: 公寓的网络分配不均。有些单位网速很快，有些几乎无法使用。管理处说这不是他们的问题。
reason: Unequal internet distribution in condo with management deflecting responsibility.
suggested_rewrite: 网络质量不均可能是内部布线问题。联合其他受影响的住户向管理层提出正式投诉。

input_text: Nak register anak masuk tadika kerajaan pun kena tunggu senarai. 200 orang dalam senarai menunggu. Macam mana?
reason: 200-person waitlist for government kindergarten, access frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Kekurangan tadika kerajaan perlu ditangani dengan membuka lebih banyak pusat atau meningkatkan kapasiti sedia ada.

input_text: Pharmacy sell medicine close to expiry at full price. Should give discount at least. Unfair to consumers.
reason: Near-expiry medicines sold at full price, consumer fairness complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Check expiry dates before purchasing medicines. If near-expiry items are sold at full price, raise it with the pharmacy or report to NPRA.

input_text: Lampu jalan kat taman ni pasang tapi wayar tak sambung. Dah setahun macam tu. Siapa yang approve projek ni?
reason: Street lights installed but not connected for a year, project quality concern.
suggested_rewrite: Projek infrastruktur yang tidak disiapkan perlu disiasat. Laporkan kepada PBT dengan bukti gambar dan minta maklumat tentang kontraktor yang bertanggungjawab.

input_text: இந்த பகுதியின் சாக்கடை அடிக்கடி அடைப்படைகிறது. துர்நாற்றம் தாங்க முடியவில்லை.
reason: Frequent sewage blockage causing unbearable stench in the area.
suggested_rewrite: சாக்கடை அடைப்பு சுகாதார அச்சுறுத்தல். IWK அல்லது உள்ளூர் அதிகாரிகளிடம் உடனடியாக புகார் செய்யவும்.

input_text: Company retreat wajib tapi kena bayar sendiri. RM500 untuk team building yang tak bermanfaat langsung.
reason: Mandatory company retreat employees must pay for themselves, RM500 for useless activities.
suggested_rewrite: Acara wajib syarikat sepatutnya ditanggung oleh majikan. Jika dipaksa membayar, berbincang dengan HR tentang dasar syarikat atau dapatkan nasihat JTK.

input_text: Why does every government project go over budget? The stadium cost doubled. Where's the accountability?
reason: Government project cost overruns doubling stadium budget, accountability question.
suggested_rewrite: Project cost overruns should be investigated by the Auditor General. Transparent procurement and regular progress audits can prevent budget inflation.

input_text: 每次去洗车都被漫天要价。说好的30块变成60。还说是因为车太脏。
reason: Car wash doubling agreed price claiming car was too dirty.
suggested_rewrite: 确保在洗车前获得明确的书面报价。如遇到不合理加价，拒绝支付并向消费者法庭投诉。

input_text: Laman web kementerian dah outdated gila. Maklumat tahun 2020 pun masih ada. Pengurusan digital country level macam ni ke?
reason: Ministry website severely outdated with 2020 information still posted.
suggested_rewrite: Laman web kementerian perlu dikemas kini secara berkala. MAMPU boleh membantu memastikan semua agensi mengekalkan laman web yang relevan dan terkini.

input_text: My kid's school toilet is so dirty they refuse to use it. Come home every day holding it in. Health issue right there.
reason: School toilet so dirty children avoid using it, causing health issues.
suggested_rewrite: Clean school toilets are a health necessity. Raise this at the PIBG meeting and report to PPD if the school doesn't address it.

input_text: Nak parking motor pun kena bayar RM2. Motor bukan ambil ruang banyak pun. Semua nak duit je.
reason: Motorcycle parking charges perceived as unfair given small space used.
suggested_rewrite: Kadar parking motosikal perlu berpatutan dengan saiz ruang yang digunakan. PBT boleh menyediakan zon parking motosikal percuma atau murah.

input_text: 这些中介收了几千块介绍费，结果介绍的工作跟说的完全不一样。
reason: Employment agency charging thousands but placing people in jobs different from promised.
suggested_rewrite: 正规职业介绍所的收费和服务应透明。如遇欺诈，可向劳工部和消费者法庭投诉。

input_text: Bas sekolah ada 40 orang budak tapi seat cuma 30. Kanak-kanak berdiri dalam bas bergerak. Bahaya sangat.
reason: Overcrowded school bus with children standing while moving, dangerous overloading.
suggested_rewrite: Bas sekolah yang melebihi kapasiti membahayakan keselamatan kanak-kanak. Laporkan kepada JPJ dan sekolah untuk tindakan segera.

input_text: Public park benches all broken. Nobody can sit and enjoy the park. Municipality collects tax but maintains nothing.
reason: Broken park benches reflecting poor municipal maintenance.
suggested_rewrite: Report broken park furniture to the local council's maintenance department with specific locations. Community volunteer maintenance days can also help.

input_text: Nak dapatkan surat pengesahan dari jabatan kerajaan pun ambil masa 2 bulan. Padahal cuma cop dan sign je.
reason: Two-month wait for a government verification letter that just needs a stamp and signature.
suggested_rewrite: Proses pengesahan dokumen kerajaan perlu dipercepat. Sistem digital dan tandatangan elektronik boleh mengurangkan masa pemprosesan.

input_text: 每次投诉物业管理，他们就说会处理。结果几个月过去了还是老样子。
reason: Building management giving empty promises about addressing complaints.
suggested_rewrite: 保留所有投诉记录和管理层的回复。如持续不作为，可以在业主大会上提出更换管理公司的动议。

input_text: Kenapa harga minyak naik cepat tapi turun lambat? Kalau world price drop, kita punya masih sama. Satu hala je.
reason: Petrol price asymmetry - quick to rise, slow to fall, despite global prices.
suggested_rewrite: Mekanisme penetapan harga minyak perlu lebih telus. Formula harga perlu mengambil kira perubahan harga minyak dunia secara adil.

input_text: Private hospital bill RM50,000 for a simple surgery. Even with insurance still have to pay RM20,000 out of pocket. Healthcare robbery.
reason: Exorbitant private hospital bill even with insurance, healthcare cost crisis.
suggested_rewrite: Hospital bills should be itemized and transparent. Request a detailed breakdown and compare with other hospitals. Consider filing a complaint if charges seem excessive.

input_text: Nak renovate dapur pun kena permit. Tapi jiran sebelah renovate satu rumah takde permit pun takde kena saman. Pilih kasih.
reason: Perceived selective enforcement of renovation permits between neighbors.
suggested_rewrite: Peraturan renovasi perlu dikuatkuasakan secara konsisten. Jika jiran membuat renovasi tanpa permit, laporkan kepada PBT untuk tindakan yang seragam.

input_text: 这个小区的垃圾场离住宅太近了。苍蝇和老鼠到处都是。孩子们的健康怎么办？
reason: Garbage collection point too close to homes attracting pests, children's health concern.
suggested_rewrite: 垃圾收集点应远离住宅区。居民可以联名向地方政府请愿要求搬迁或改善垃圾管理。

input_text: பேருந்து நிலையத்தில் போதுமான இருக்கைகள் இல்லை. முதியவர்கள் நின்றபடி காத்திருக்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Bus station lacking adequate seating forcing elderly to stand and wait.
suggested_rewrite: பேருந்து நிலையங்களில் முதியவர்களுக்கு போதுமான இருக்கை வசதிகள் வழங்கப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: Semua kedai repair handphone kat sini overcharge. Bateri RM20 tapi caj RM100 untuk pasang. Upah lebih mahal dari barang.
reason: Phone repair shops overcharging for labor vs parts cost.
suggested_rewrite: Dapatkan beberapa sebut harga sebelum membaiki telefon. Minta pecahan kos bahagian dan upah secara bertulis sebelum membenarkan kerja pembaikan.

input_text: So hard to find halal food options in East Malaysia compared to West Malaysia. Feels like we're forgotten.
reason: Limited halal food options in East Malaysia, feeling neglected as Muslim.
suggested_rewrite: Expanding halal certification support to East Malaysia would help Muslim consumers and food businesses. JAKIM can work with state authorities to increase certified outlets.

input_text: Kos rawatan gigi swasta memang gila. Nak buat root canal RM3000. Orang biasa mana mampu. Cabut je la lepas tu.
reason: Private dental costs forcing people to choose extraction over treatment due to affordability.
suggested_rewrite: Kos rawatan pergigian swasta memang tinggi. Pertimbangkan klinik pergigian universiti atau hospital kerajaan yang menawarkan perkhidmatan pada kos yang lebih rendah.

input_text: 公共图书馆的藏书太旧了。很多都是十几年前的。年轻人怎么获取新知识？
reason: Outdated public library collection failing to serve young people's learning needs.
suggested_rewrite: 公共图书馆应定期更新藏书。数字化资源和电子书平台可以补充实体藏书的不足。

input_text: Budak Grab Food bawak motor laju gila. Nak kejar order banyak tapi jeopardize safety orang lain. System reward dia yang salah.
reason: Delivery riders speeding to maximize orders, systemic incentive design flaw.
suggested_rewrite: Gig economy platform perlu menyemak sistem ganjaran supaya tidak menggalakkan pemanduan berbahaya. Had pesanan serentak boleh membantu keselamatan jalan raya.

input_text: Nak buat IC baru sebab hilang kena bayar RM300. Duit penalti tu pergi mana? Orang dah rugi IC kena bayar lagi.
reason: RM300 penalty for IC replacement adding insult to injury of losing important document.
suggested_rewrite: Denda penggantian MyKad memang ditetapkan untuk menggalakkan penjagaan yang baik. Pastikan simpan salinan MyKad dan buat laporan polis jika hilang.

input_text: The new condo development blocks our entire sea view. Developer didn't tell existing residents about the project. No transparency.
reason: New development blocking sea view with no prior notice to existing residents.
suggested_rewrite: New developments should undergo public consultation. Check if proper EIA and planning permissions were obtained and attend the local council's planning sessions.

input_text: 每次台风季节都有人非法砍树。导致山体滑坡。有关部门知道但不采取行动。
reason: Illegal logging during monsoon season causing landslides with authority inaction.
suggested_rewrite: 非法伐木导致的山体滑坡威胁生命安全。向林业局和环境部门举报非法伐木活动。

input_text: Nak complain kat DBKL pun kena isi borang 10 helai. Orang tua mana reti nak buat semua tu. Complicated sangat.
reason: Complex 10-page complaint form at DBKL excluding elderly who can't navigate bureaucracy.
suggested_rewrite: Proses aduan perlu dipermudahkan terutama untuk warga emas. DBKL boleh menyediakan kaunter bantuan khas atau sistem aduan ringkas melalui telefon.

input_text: Hospital food so bad that patients prefer to starve. Recovery delayed because of poor nutrition. Management please take note.
reason: Hospital food quality so poor patients prefer not eating, affecting recovery.
suggested_rewrite: Hospital nutrition is critical for patient recovery. Provide specific feedback to the hospital's dietitian department and patient affairs unit.
